codex: FINDING: CONTINUE IS FAITHFUL, but only as a wholesale reconstruction, not a cosmetic revision. The review does not prove the causal-statistical kernel false or laundered: under the same standard interior single-initiation, consistency/sequential-exchangeability, local-positivity, CAR, bounded-hazard, and known-s-Hölder assumptions, the observed law can plausibly identify an a.e.-defined initiation-response curve whose unique Hölder extension selects g_P(u_star); kernel bias is then O(b^s), the localized EIF variance is plausibly O(b^(-1)), balancing b^s with (nb)^(-1/2) gives b asymptotic to n^(-1/(2s+1)) and risk n^(-s/(2s+1)), and an uncensored bounded-hazard submodel can plausibly support the matching local-bump lower bound. The checkpoint nevertheless proves that the present proposal does not yet state valid results: P_n(T_n^{u_star}<=t_0) is not an observed-law functional as written; “causal validity” is not an identifying map; the regularized target is not connected to a defined stochastic initiation-hazard intervention; a generally signed local-polynomial equivalent kernel is not itself an intervention density; invoking the published fixed-window EIF without proving linearity/target equivalence is presently an unsupported bridge; sigma_hat confuses score standard deviation O(b^(-1/2)) with estimator standard error O((nb)^(-1/2)); the Gaussian assumption is circular; and the nuisance feasibility, lower experiment, honesty, and optimal-length claims are unproved. These are load-bearing specification defects, but they admit repair without encoding the desired frontier as an assumption. The exact-time upper and lower minimax rates, uniform Gaussian approximation, honest bias-aware interval, and honest expected-length lower bound—namely current thm:upper-rate, thm:lower-rate, thm:gaussian, thm:ci, and thm:ci-lower-length—must all be demoted to explicitly open conjectures until proved. The Hölder-version identification/bias statement may remain a lemma only after an observed-law identification formula and the stochastic-intervention/EIF bridge are actually established.

tried: Mandatory gpt-5.6-sol consultation; continue to v5 with one wholesale directive preserving the effective-count Gaussian/marked-compound-Poisson kernel while repairing causal attribution, the circular efficiency class, the exact-target honest-interval focal object, and Ai-Huang-Zhang differentiation.
codex: FINDING: CONTINUE IS FAITHFUL, but only for a wholesale v5 reconstruction. The replacement field-tier kernel is mathematically plausible under the same standard interior single-initiation, known-(s,L) Hölder, local-positivity, CAR, and bounded-hazard scope; it is neither false nor laundered. A localized EIF whose leading term is a b_n^(-1)-scaled contribution occurring with probability O(b_n) naturally has variance O(b_n^(-1)): when m_n=n b_n→∞, a Lindeberg-type argument can plausibly yield a Gaussian limit, whereas when m_n→lambda in (0,∞), convergence of the rare local-initiation point process and its CAR-weighted marks can plausibly yield a centered marked compound-Poisson experiment. The critical conclusion does not, however, follow from m_n=n b_n, the local-Riesz variance limit, or the definition of Q_{P,lambda}. It still requires a real limit-experiment construction: specify a nonempty class-preserving triangular subclass, prove rare-event point-process/Laplace-functional convergence, identify the limiting intensity and mark law, control compensators and all nonlocal EIF components, establish nondegeneracy and non-Gaussianity, and show nuisance/remainder terms are negligible at the critical scale. Existing boundedness and Hölder assumptions need not be strengthened to stipulate that conclusion; an explicit smooth bounded-hazard CAR subclass can be constructed inside them. Conversely, local-Riesz scaling alone does not establish a uniform Gaussian theorem over the stated upper model, and R_n, as currently defined by requiring the very EIF expansion being compared, makes the claimed “sharp regular efficiency frontier” definition-induced. The checkpoint is therefore genuinely REVISE, not terminal: preserve the Gaussian/compound-Poisson boundary as the new open theorem-level contribution, but continue only if v5 removes the circular efficiency claim, repairs causal attribution, formalizes exact-target honesty, and treats both limiting experiments as proofs to be constructed rather than consequences of definitions.
why: REVISE is convergent and fixable at field tier. The phase boundary is not definition-induced, but efficiency as currently phrased is; do NOT add a Poisson/Gaussian convergence assumption, and do NOT revive any v1-v3 construction.

codex:
FINDING

Not faithful convergence. The three flagged defects remain real and foundational, so angle 1 v3 is a recurring-root-defect revision, not a terminal mathematical failure. The angle remains viable after exact dependency and typing repairs.

ACTION

REVISE. Do not accept the EIF, phase-transition, plug-in, Gaussian, marked-Poisson, or confidence-diameter conclusions as established; retain all of them as open, including the independent exogenous-\(q_b\) EIF derivation.

DIRECTIVE

1. Type score integrability only for the fixed \(b\) EIF theorem. Use the actual bracket condition
\[
E_P\!\left[(V_{0,P,b}(0,X)-R_b(P))^2+
\int [W_{0,P,b}(1-V_{0,P,b})]^2\,d\langle M_{02,P}\rangle+
\int [W_{1,P,b}(1-V_{1,P})]^2\,d\langle M_{12,P}\rangle\right]<\infty .
\]
This includes the relevant predictable risk indicators through the martingale brackets. Remove the free-\(b\) assumption from the estimator-independent minimax class \(\mathcal P_s(L)\). For \(b_n\), separately derive triangular-array variance, Lindeberg/uniform-integrability, nuisance-rate, and remainder conditions. Do not encode \(b_n\), the fitted estimator, or uniform inference into \(\mathcal P_s(L)\); honesty and nonemptiness of \(\mathcal B_\alpha^G\) remain questions to prove.

2. Add `ass:bounded-hazards` to `lem:extension-invariance` and its dependency list, and define the relevant marginal initiation density explicitly. In the stated baseline-eligible hazard model,
\[
f_U(u)=E\!\left[S^o_{0,P}(u\mid X)\alpha_{01,P}(u\mid X)\right],
\]
or, for observed uncensored initiation,
\[
f_U^{\rm obs}(u)=E\!\left[S^o_{0,P}(u\mid X)G_{0,P}(u\mid X)\alpha_{01,P}(u\mid X)\right].
\]
Bounded hazards give \(S^o_0\ge e^{-2H\tau}\) and \(G_0\ge e^{-H\tau}\). With \(m(X)=\inf_{|u-u_\star|\le\delta}\alpha_{01,P}(u\mid X)>0\) almost surely, the respective density is bounded below by \(e^{-2H\tau}E[m(X)]>0\), or \(e^{-3H\tau}E[m(X)]>0\). Thus local full support follows. If baseline eligibility is not guaranteed, additionally require positive baseline eligibility in the relevant strata; bounded hazards cannot create support from an empty initial risk set.

3. Replace the global uncensored claim by its active-support form. Let
\[
A_0=\{t:\overline Q_b(t)>0\},\qquad
A_1=\{(t,u):q_b(u)>0,\ \overline Q_b(u)>0,\ u\le t\le t_0\}.
\]
If \(\alpha_{01,P}=a_b\) on \(A_0\) and censoring hazards vanish, then
\[
W_{0,P,b}=1\ \text{on }A_0,\qquad W_{1,P,b}=1\ \text{on }A_1,
\]
while both weights—and hence their martingale integrands—are zero off their respective active supports under the adopted convention. Equivalently, the globally defined weights reduce to the appropriate active-support indicators, not to the constant one.
why: The three defects are real and foundational but repairable without laundering or changing the phase-transition target. Do NOT reintroduce free-b score integrability into P_s(L), infer support without the risk-set factor, or state weights equal one off active support.

codex:
FINDING: The three flags are distinct, repairable hygiene/well-posedness defects, not a recurring same-root failure. They concern three separate interfaces: full-data censoring identification, endpoint typing of the post-initiation EIF weight, and separation of asymptotic regimes. No terminal/cap action is warranted.

ACTION: REVISE and retain for convergence. Replace `ass:car` by genuine CAR: if \(\mathcal F^{\mathrm{full}}_{t-}\) is the full-data filtration and \(\mathcal H_{t-}\subseteq\mathcal F^{\mathrm{full}}_{t-}\) the observed-history filtration, require
\[
\lambda_C^{\mathrm{full}}(t\mid\mathcal F^{\mathrm{full}}_{t-})
=\lambda_C^{\mathrm{obs}}(t\mid\mathcal H_{t-})
\quad dt\times P_{\mathrm{full}}\text{-a.e.},
\]
for an \(\mathcal H_{t-}\)-predictable intensity \(\lambda_C^{\mathrm{obs}}\); define the pre/post-initiation censoring hazards and \(G_0,G_1\) from that observed-history intensity. Do not restate equality after conditioning both sides on \(\mathcal H_t\). Define
\[
W_{1,P,b}(t,u,x)=
\frac{S^b_{0,P}(u\mid x)a_b(u)}
{S^o_{0,P}(u\mid x)\alpha_{01,P}(u\mid x)G_{0,P}(u\mid x)G_{1,P}(t,u\mid x)}
\]
only on \(A_1=\{(t,u):q_b(u)>0,\ \overline Q_b(u)>0,\ u\le t\le t_0\}\), and set \(W_1=0\) off \(A_1\), including exhaustion endpoints; likewise set every inactive or endpoint martingale integrand to zero. Add a separate diverging-count triangular family \(P_G^{(n)}\) with \(b_n\downarrow0\) and \(nb_n\to\infty\), and define its oracle statistic
\[
Z^o_{G,n}
=
\frac{\widetilde R^{\,G}_{b_n}-R_{b_n}(P_G^{(n)})}
{s^o_{G,n}},
\qquad
s^o_{G,n}
=
\sqrt{\frac{v_{P_G^{(n)},b_n}}{n}},
\]
where
\[
\widetilde R^{\,G}_{b_n}
=
R_{b_n}(P_G^{(n)})
+\frac1n\sum_{i=1}^n\phi^q_{P_G^{(n)},b_n}(O_{ni}).
\]
State Gaussian convergence only as an open problem conditional on an explicit triangular Lindeberg condition, deterministic variance stabilization/nondegeneracy, and separately enumerated cross-fitted nuisance, remainder, survival, and uniform-integrability conditions. Retain \(P^{(n)}=P_0,\ b_n=\lambda/n\) exclusively for the critical marked-Poisson experiment.

DIRECTIVE: Advance after those three literal repairs. Preserve the exogenous EIF as independently pathwise derived. Leave all Gaussian, marked-Poisson, plug-in-equivalence, self-normalization, confidence-honesty, and minimax-diameter conclusions explicitly open; none may be implied by the repaired definitions.
why: Codex found three distinct repairable interfaces, not a recurring same-root failure. Do NOT restate tautological observed-history CAR, evaluate a_b/W1 at exhaustion endpoints, or ask for nb_n→∞ under the critical b_n=lambda/n family.
